sequence.subject: [TEST] Quick question
sequence.body:
Hi Chris,

I came across Example HR and noticed you provide HR support to SMEs.

One thing we have heard repeatedly from HR consultancies is that clients increasingly expect a software platform alongside advice, policies, and support.

Vesra helps HR consultancies offer a branded HR platform to clients without having to build or maintain software themselves.

The result is stronger client retention, a more complete service offering, and an additional recurring revenue stream.

Would it be worth sending over a short overview?

If this is not relevant, reply unsubscribe and I will not contact you again.
Unsubscribe: mailto:chris@getvesra.co.uk?subject=Unsubscribe

Best,
Chris

sequence.subject: [TEST] Re: Quick question
sequence.body:
Hi Chris,

Just following up in case my previous email got buried.

Out of interest, do your clients ever ask for recommendations on HR software or systems?

That is typically where we see the strongest fit, as many HR consultancies want to provide clients with more than advice and documentation alone.

Happy to send over a brief overview if helpful.

If this is not relevant, reply unsubscribe and I will not contact you again.
Unsubscribe: mailto:chris@getvesra.co.uk?subject=Unsubscribe

Best,
Chris

sequence.subject: [TEST] Helping HR consultancies grow recurring revenue
sequence.body:
Hi Chris,

One reason HR consultancies explore Vesra is that it allows them to generate recurring software revenue alongside their consultancy services.

Rather than simply recommending a third-party platform, partners can offer their own branded HR solution to clients while continuing to provide advice and support.

It helps strengthen client relationships and creates an additional revenue stream without increasing consulting hours.

Would it be useful to see how it works?

If this is not relevant, reply unsubscribe and I will not contact you again.
Unsubscribe: mailto:chris@getvesra.co.uk?subject=Unsubscribe

Best,
Chris

sequence.subject: [TEST] Should I close your file?
sequence.body:
Hi Chris,

I have tried reaching out a couple of times and have not heard back, so I will assume one of the following:

- Timing is not right.
- It is not relevant.
- You are busy helping clients.

If offering HR software as part of your service is not something you are exploring right now, no problem at all.

Just let me know and I will close the file.

If this is not relevant, reply unsubscribe and I will not contact you again.
Unsubscribe: mailto:chris@getvesra.co.uk?subject=Unsubscribe

Best,
Chris
